When the hands come out first, the time at which the arms

The unique importance of the moment when the head, hand
or feet comes out does not seem to be logical. It is not possible
to answer the question -Why the influence of planets become
important in that exact moment at which head, hand or feet
comes out? Therefore this argument is also not acceptable.
4. The time at which Umbilical cord is cut
Some say, "The time at which umbilical cord is cut should
be taken as the exact time of birth".
This opinion gained much popularity recently. Usually in
hospitals etc, the time at which umbilical cord is cut, is told
as the birth time to the parents. This moment is important as
independent existence of the child start (breaking the body
relation with mother) from that moment onwards. This
